---
bibliography: ../references.bib
link-citations: true
number-sections: false
---

# References {.unnumbered}

This appendix lists every source **cited** in handbook chapters (`[@key]` citations). Entries are drawn from [`references.bib`](../references.bib). Formatted with APA (7th ed.).

For a **topic-organized reading guide** (textbooks, CONSORT/STROBE/TRIPOD, respiratory methods), see [REFERENCES.md](REFERENCES.md).

**To cite this handbook:** see [Cite this book](chapters/00-preface.md#cite-this-book) in the Preface (APA 7th ed.).

::: {#refs}
:::
